violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The laminate edge of the prep table is missing and is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the cappuccino machine needs cleaned.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. Thawing soup in the sanitizer sink without an air gap.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in freezer floors need to be cleaned.
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
